name: typing
description: Language-agnostic advanced type-system knowledge. Covers parametric/ad-hoc/subtype/row polymorphism, variance, kinds, higher-kinded types, type classes vs traits vs interfaces, GADTs, type-level programming, dependent types, and refinement types across Haskell, Idris/Agda/Lean, OCaml, Scala, TypeScript, F*, and Liquid Haskell. Ships companion files dependent-types.md (Pi/Sigma types, indexed families, length-indexed vectors, refinement + branded types) and type-level-programming.md (GADTs, type families, HKTs, phantom types, type-level naturals, row polymorphism, TypeScript conditional/mapped/template-literal types). Rust-specific surface (impl Trait, GATs, PhantomData variance, type-state, sealed traits) lives in the rust skill's typespace.md.
